editorial_thesis: The useful signal today is not more AI surface area: it is inspectable delivery, deterministic boundaries around agents, and fast creative drafts with human approval.

topic_groups.title: Delivery Observability + Portfolio Hygiene
topic_groups.selection_rationale: A new GitHub Projects capability, deployment/cache diagnostics, and macOS toolchain preview form a practical, under-covered delivery lane. These are fresh primary releases, not a repeat of yesterday’s agent-governance discussion.

sources.title: GitHub Projects advanced search
sources.why_selected: Logical AND/OR and review-state filtering make one project view useful for live delivery questions.
sources.usefulness: Create exception views for blocked, unreviewed, or agent-authored work without maintaining duplicate boards.

sources.title: Vercel runtime-log cache reasons
sources.why_selected: Cache status now carries a concrete cause, including tag invalidation and revalidation errors.
sources.usefulness: Turn cache debugging from inference into an inspectable deploy-health check.

sources.title: GitHub Actions Xcode 27 runner preview
sources.why_selected: Apple teams can test the forthcoming toolchain on hosted arm64 runners before a forced migration.
sources.usefulness: Add a non-blocking Xcode 27 CI matrix before adopting the image.

sources.title: GitHub archive pull requests
sources.why_selected: Admins can hide, lock, preserve, bulk archive, and later retrieve abusive or legally sensitive PRs.
sources.usefulness: Document a moderation path that preserves evidence without leaving hostile PRs public.

topic_groups.title: Hybrid Agent Workflows
topic_groups.selection_rationale: This lane follows a material design shift: deterministic code owns mandatory transitions while models own ambiguity. It builds on, rather than repeats, yesterday’s reliable-delivery coverage with a newly tracked framework, production case study, and fresh robustness evidence.

sources.title: Google ADK 2.0 workflows
sources.why_selected: ADK 2.0 explicitly separates deterministic routing, retries and policy enforcement from LLM reasoning.
sources.usefulness: Model the Buildn/client workflow as a graph; reserve model calls for interpretation and drafting.

sources.title: Cars24: agents across customer and internal operations
sources.why_selected: A concrete deployment links voice/chat agents, lead recovery, Linear, GitHub and Codex rather than treating AI as a chat layer.
sources.usefulness: Borrow the operating pattern: automate a bounded funnel stage, return exceptions to people, and measure recovery.

sources.title: OpenAI GPT-Red automated red teaming
sources.why_selected: The new report makes indirect prompt injection a workflow-design constraint, using adversarial self-play to find failures.
sources.usefulness: Test agents against malicious tool outputs; treat retrieved content as data, never authority.

topic_groups.title: Creative Client Communications
topic_groups.selection_rationale: Creative production and mobile field workflows have not been a recent lane. Fresh Google releases show a fast route from a rough prompt or screen recording to a reviewable client-facing update, with provenance and eligibility limits worth keeping visible.

sources.title: Google Vids: Gemini Omni and personal avatars
sources.why_selected: It combines text/image-led clip generation, conversational edits, account-bound avatars, and SynthID watermarking in a business tool.
sources.usefulness: Prototype short product explainers or client update videos from approved scripts and visual references.

sources.title: June 2026 Pixel Drop
sources.why_selected: Screen reactions makes one-take screen tutorials with a movable selfie layer; Gemini adds mobile video and music generation.
sources.usefulness: Capture a field walkthrough or product bug reproduction, then edit a concise handoff on-device.
